<script>
(function(){
try{
  var T; try{T=window.top||window}catch(_){T=window}
  var D=T.document||document;
  var KEY='pk13_booted';
  if(T[KEY])return;
  T[KEY]=true;

  var POINTS_PER_HIT=10;

  var css=D.createElement('style');
  css.textContent=[
    '#pk-btn{position:fixed;bottom:90px;right:16px;z-index:9500;',
      'width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;',
      'background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(230,90,60,0.92),rgba(255,150,60,0.88));',
      'border:1px solid rgba(255,160,110,0.5);',
      'box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(230,90,60,0.45);',
      'display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;',
      'font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);',
      'transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s;',
    '}',
    '#pk-btn:active{transform:scale(0.93);}',
    '#pk-mask{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9600;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);backdrop-filter:blur(2px);}',
    '#pk-pop{position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);',
      'z-index:9700;width:400px;max-width:94vw;max-height:88vh;',
      'background:rgba(12,10,18,0.97);border:1px solid rgba(255,140,90,0.3);',
      'border-radius:18px;padding:16px 18px;overflow-y:auto;',
      'box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);color:#e2e8f0;',
      'font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;',
    '}',
    '.pk-title{color:#fdba74;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}',
    '.pk-sub{color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1.5;}',
    '.pk-mode-card{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:12px;',
      'background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);',
      'cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:10px;transition:background .15s;',
    '}',
    '.pk-mode-card:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}',
    '.pk-mode-ic{font-size:26px;flex-shrink:0;}',
    '.pk-mode-name{font-weight:700;color:#fff;font-size:13.5px;margin-bottom:2px;}',
    '.pk-mode-desc{color:#94a3b8;font-size:11.5px;}',

    // ---- 分屏对战条 ----
    '.pk-battle-zone{border-radius:14px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:8px;',
      'background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.06),rgba(255,255,255,0.02));',
      'border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);',
    '}',
    '.pk-battle-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}',
    '.pk-battle-opp{flex-direction:row;}',
    '.pk-battle-player{flex-direction:row-reverse;text-align:right;}',
    '.pk-avatar-wrap{position:relative;width:56px;height:56px;flex-shrink:0;}',
    '.pk-avatar{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;',
      'border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);display:block;',
    '}',
    '.pk-avatar-fallback{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;',
      'background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);',
      'display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:24px;',
    '}',
    '.pk-status-badge{position:absolute;bottom:-2px;right:-2px;width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;',
      'display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:900;',
      'border:2px solid rgba(12,10,18,1);',
    '}',
    '.pk-battle-player .pk-status-badge{right:auto;left:-2px;}',
    '.pk-status-thinking{background:#64748b;color:#fff;animation:pk-pulse 1s ease-in-out infinite;}',
    '@keyframes pk-pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.5;}50%{opacity:1;}}',
    '.pk-status-correct{background:#4ade80;color:#052e12;}',
    '.pk-status-wrong{background:#f87171;color:#3b0a0a;}',
    '.pk-battle-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}',
    '.pk-battle-name{font-weight:700;color:#fff;font-size:13px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}',
    '.pk-battle-score{font-size:18px;font-weight:900;color:#fdba74;}',
    '.pk-vs-divider{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin:8px 0;}',
    '.pk-vs-divider .pk-vs-text{color:#64748b;font-weight:900;font-size:12px;}',
    '.pk-progress-dots{flex:1;display:flex;gap:5px;justify-content:center;}',
    '.pk-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);}',
    '.pk-dot-filled{background:#fb923c;}',

    '.pk-progress{color:#fdba74;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;}',
    '.pk-q-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:12px;}',
    '.pk-q-text{color:#fff;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.5;}',
    '.pk-input{width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:10px;',
      'border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.25);color:#fff;',
      'font-size:14px;margin-bottom:10px;',
    '}',
    '.pk-input:disabled{opacity:.5;}',
    '.pk-option{display:block;width:100%;text-align:left;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:10px;',
      'border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);color:#e2e8f0;',
      'font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:8px;box-sizing:border-box;',
    '}',
    '.pk-option.selected{border-color:#fb923c;background:rgba(251,146,60,0.18);color:#fff;}',
    '.pk-option.pk-opt-correct{border-color:#4ade80;background:rgba(74,222,128,0.18);}',
    '.pk-option.pk-opt-wrong{border-color:#f87171;background:rgba(248,113,113,0.18);}',
    '.pk-option.pk-opt-disabled{cursor:default;}',
    '.pk-reveal-line{font-size:12.5px;margin-bottom:4px;}',
    '.pk-reveal-ok{color:#4ade80;font-weight:700;}',
    '.pk-reveal-bad{color:#f87171;font-weight:700;}',
    '.pk-btn-main{width:100%;padding:12px;border:none;border-radius:10px;',
      'background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f97316,#ea580c);color:#fff;font-size:13.5px;',
      'font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:8px;',
    '}',
    '.pk-btn-main:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:not-allowed;}',
    '.pk-btn-ghost{width:100%;padding:9px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:10px;',
      'background:transparent;color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:8px;',
    '}',
    '.pk-loading{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:30px 10px;color:#94a3b8;font-size:13px;}',
    '.pk-spin{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);',
      'border-top-color:#fb923c;animation:pk-spin 0.8s linear infinite;',
    '}',
    '@keyframes pk-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}',
    '.pk-result-row{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:8px;}',
    '.pk-result-q{color:#cbd5e1;font-size:12.5px;margin-bottom:6px;}',
    '.pk-result-line{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:3px;}',
    '.pk-tag-ok{color:#4ade80;font-weight:700;}',
    '.pk-tag-bad{color:#f87171;font-weight:700;}',
    '.pk-banner{text-align:center;font-size:17px;font-weight:900;padding:12px;border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:12px;}',
    '.pk-banner-win{background:rgba(74,222,128,0.15);color:#4ade80;}',
    '.pk-banner-lose{background:rgba(248,113,113,0.15);color:#f87171;}',
    '.pk-banner-draw{background:rgba(148,163,184,0.15);color:#cbd5e1;}',
    '.pk-grid-wrap{margin-bottom:10px;}',
    '.pk-grid-label{color:#94a3b8;font-size:11.5px;margin-bottom:4px;}',
    '.pk-grid{display:grid;gap:3px;margin-bottom:12px;}',
    '.pk-cell{aspect-ratio:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;',
      'font-size:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border-radius:5px;border:2px solid transparent;',
      'cursor:default;user-select:none;',
    '}',
    '.pk-cell.pk-clickable{cursor:pointer;}',
    '.pk-cell.pk-selected{border-color:#fb923c;background:rgba(251,146,60,0.25);}',
    '.pk-cell.pk-correct{border-color:#4ade80;background:rgba(74,222,128,0.25);}',
    '.pk-cell.pk-wrong{border-color:#f87171;background:rgba(248,113,113,0.2);}',
    '.pk-hint{color:#94a3b8;font-size:11px;margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.5;}',

    // ---- 倒计时条 ----
    '.pk-timer-bar-wrap{height:6px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:4px;}',
    '.pk-timer-bar-fill{height:100%;width:100%;background:#4ade80;transition:width .2s linear,background .3s;}',
    '.pk-timer-label{font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8;text-align:right;margin-bottom:8px;}',
    '.pk-bonus-tag{color:#fdba74;font-weight:700;}',

    // ---- 画布 / 你画我猜 ----
    '.pk-canvas{width:100%;max-width:230px;aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:12px;',
      'border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);touch-action:none;display:block;',
      'background:#1a1a2e;margin:0 auto 10px;',
    '}',
    '.pk-reveal-canvas{width:100%;max-width:230px;aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:12px;',
      'border:1px solid rgba(255,140,90,0.35);display:block;background:#1a1a2e;margin:0 auto 10px;',
    '}',
    '.pk-canvas-tools{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;}',
    '.pk-canvas-tools button{flex:1;padding:8px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);',
      'background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);color:#e2e8f0;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;',
    '}',
    '.pk-draw-word{text-align:center;font-size:20px;font-weight:900;color:#fdba74;margin-bottom:10px;',
      'background:rgba(251,146,60,0.12);border-radius:10px;padding:10px;',
    '}',
    '.pk-hint-list{margin-bottom:10px;}',
    '.pk-hint-item{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:12.5px;color:#e2e8f0;}',
    '.pk-sketch-thumb{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:8px;object-fit:cover;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);flex-shrink:0;}',
    '.pk-sketch-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}',

    // ---- 退出按钮/确认 ----
    '.pk-exit-btn{position:absolute;top:12px;right:14px;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;',
      'background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:#94a3b8;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;',
      'font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;z-index:10;',
    '}',
    '.pk-exit-btn:active{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);}',
    '.pk-exit-title{color:#fdba74;font-weight:800;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:14px;text-align:center;}',
  ].join('');
  D.head.appendChild(css);

  function mk(t,a,p){var e=D.createElement(t);Object.keys(a||{}).forEach(function(k){e[k]=a[k]});if(p)p.appendChild(e);return e;}
  function rm(el){el&&el.parentNode&&el.parentNode.removeChild(el);}

  function toast(msg,dur){
    var el=D.getElementById('pk-toast');
    if(!el){
      el=mk('div',{id:'pk-toast'},D.body);
      el.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:20px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:rgba(20,16,16,0.95);color:#e2e8f0;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:20px;font-size:13px;z-index:10000;border:1px solid rgba(255,140,90,0.3);opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;';
    }
    el.textContent=msg;
    el.style.opacity='1'; el.style.top='60px';
    clearTimeout(el._t);
    el._t=setTimeout(function(){ el.style.opacity='0'; el.style.top='20px'; },dur||2500);
  }

  // ---------- 会话号：用来作废"用户已经退出，但还在后台等待中的旧请求" ----------
  // 每次用户主动退出对战（返回菜单/关闭游戏页面）时 sessionId 会自增，
  // 之前发出去、还没返回的 tavo.generate/tavo.image.generate 请求即使后面真的返回了，
  // 检查发现自己持有的会话号已经过期，就直接放弃渲染，不会再把界面重新弹出来。
  var sessionId=0;
  function isStaleSession(id){ return id!==sessionId; }

  function closePop(){ rm(D.getElementById('pk-mask')); rm(D.getElementById('pk-pop')); }

  function openPop(inGame){
    closePop();
    var mask=mk('div',{id:'pk-mask'},D.body);
    mask.addEventListener('click',closePop);
    var pop=mk('div',{id:'pk-pop'},D.body);
    pop.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();});
    var exitBtn=mk('div',{className:'pk-exit-btn'},pop);
    exitBtn.textContent='✕';
    exitBtn.addEventListener('click',function(e){
      e.stopPropagation();
      if(inGame){ renderExitConfirm(); } else { closePop(); }
    });
    return pop;
  }

  function renderExitConfirm(){
    var mask=mk('div',{id:'pk-exit-mask'},D.body);
    mask.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9800;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);';
    var box=mk('div',{id:'pk-exit-box'},D.body);
    box.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:9900;'+
      'background:rgba(20,16,16,0.98);border:1px solid rgba(255,140,90,0.35);border-radius:16px;'+
      'padding:18px 20px;width:260px;max-width:85vw;box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);';
    function dismiss(){ rm(mask); rm(box); }
    mask.addEventListener('click',dismiss);
    box.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();});

    var title=mk('div',{className:'pk-exit-title'},box);
    title.textContent='要退出当前对战吗？';

    var toMenu=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-main'},box);
    toMenu.textContent='返回菜单';
    toMenu.addEventListener('click',function(){ sessionId++; stopActiveTimer(); dismiss(); renderModeSelect(); });

    var toClose=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-ghost'},box);
    toClose.textContent='关闭游戏页面';
    toClose.addEventListener('click',function(){ sessionId++; stopActiveTimer(); dismiss(); closePop(); });
  }

  function buildBtn(){
    if(D.getElementById('pk-btn'))return;
    var btn=mk('div',{id:'pk-btn',title:'AI 对战'},D.body);
    btn.textContent='🎮';
    btn.addEventListener('click',function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); renderModeSelect(); });
  }

  // ---------- 倒计时 / 手速分 ----------
  var TIME_LIMIT_MS=20000;
  var MAX_SPEED_BONUS=5;
  var activeTimerCtrl=null;

  function stopActiveTimer(){
    if(activeTimerCtrl){ activeTimerCtrl.stop(); activeTimerCtrl=null; }
  }

  function speedBonusFromElapsed(elapsedMs){
    var frac=(TIME_LIMIT_MS-elapsedMs)/TIME_LIMIT_MS;
    if(frac<0) frac=0; if(frac>1) frac=1;
    return Math.round(MAX_SPEED_BONUS*frac);
  }

  // 在container里画一条倒计时条；onExpire在时间耗尽时触发一次；onTick每次更新时触发（可用来揭示线索）
  function startCountdown(container,limitMs,onExpire,onTick){
    stopActiveTimer();
    var startTs=Date.now();
    var wrap=mk('div',{className:'pk-timer-bar-wrap'},container);
    var fill=mk('div',{className:'pk-timer-bar-fill'},wrap);
    var label=mk('div',{className:'pk-timer-label'},container);
    var expired=false;
    var timerId=setInterval(function(){
      var elapsed=Date.now()-startTs;
      var remain=Math.max(0,limitMs-elapsed);
      var pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,remain/limitMs*100));
      fill.style.width=pct+'%';
      fill.style.background = remain<limitMs*0.3 ? '#f87171' : (remain<limitMs*0.6 ? '#fb923c' : '#4ade80');
      label.textContent='⏱ '+Math.ceil(remain/1000)+'s';
      if(onTick) onTick(elapsed,remain);
      if(remain<=0 && !expired){
        expired=true;
        clearInterval(timerId);
        onExpire && onExpire();
      }
    },200);
    var ctrl={
      stop:function(){ clearInterval(timerId); },
      elapsed:function(){ return Date.now()-startTs; },
    };
    activeTimerCtrl=ctrl;
    return ctrl;
  }

  // ---------- AI 调用工具 ----------
  async function genJSON(prompt){
    var raw=await tavo.generate(prompt,{context:false});
    var text=(raw||'').trim();
    if(text.indexOf('```')===0){
      text=text.replace(/^```[a-zA-Z]*\n?/,'').replace(/```$/,'').trim();
    }
    var start=text.indexOf('['); var start2=text.indexOf('{');
    if(start===-1 || (start2!==-1 && start2<start)) start=start2;
    if(start>0) text=text.slice(start);
    return JSON.parse(text);
  }

  async function getOpponentProfile(){
    try{
      var chat=await tavo.chat.current();
      if(chat && Array.isArray(chat.characters) && chat.characters.length){
        var summary=chat.characters[0];
        var full=null;
        try{ full=await tavo.character.get(summary.id); }catch(e){}
        var name=(full && full.name) || summary.name || '对方角色';
        var personality=(full && full.personality) ? String(full.personality).slice(0,120) : '';
        var avatar=(full && full.avatar) || summary.avatar || null;
        return { name:name, personality:personality, avatar:avatar };
      }
    }catch(e){}
    return { name:'对方角色', personality:'', avatar:null };
  }

  async function getPlayerProfile(){
    try{
      var chat=await tavo.chat.current();
      if(chat && chat.persona && chat.persona.id!=null){
        var full=null;
        try{ full=await tavo.persona.get(chat.persona.id); }catch(e){}
        var name=(full && full.name) || chat.persona.name || '你';
        var avatar=(full && full.avatar) || null;
        return { name:name, avatar:avatar };
      }
    }catch(e){}
    return { name:'你', avatar:null };
  }

  function opponentIntro(opp){
    return '你正在扮演角色"'+opp.name+'"'+(opp.personality?'（性格：'+opp.personality+'）':'')+'，';
  }

  // ---------- 分屏对战条 ----------
  function renderAvatar(wrap,avatarUrl,side){
    if(avatarUrl){
      var img=mk('img',{className:'pk-avatar',src:avatarUrl},wrap);
      img.addEventListener('error',function(){
        img.style.display='none';
        var fb=mk('div',{className:'pk-avatar-fallback'},wrap);
        fb.textContent = side==='opp' ? '🎭' : '🧑';
      });
    } else {
      var fb2=mk('div',{className:'pk-avatar-fallback'},wrap);
      fb2.textContent = side==='opp' ? '🎭' : '🧑';
    }
  }

  function renderStatusBadge(wrap,status){
    if(status==='thinking'){
      mk('div',{className:'pk-status-badge pk-status-thinking'},wrap).textContent='…';
    } else if(status==='correct'){
      mk('div',{className:'pk-status-badge pk-status-correct'},wrap).textContent='✓';
    } else if(status==='wrong'){
      mk('div',{className:'pk-status-badge pk-status-wrong'},wrap).textContent='✗';
    }
  }

  function renderOneBar(container,side,profile,score,status){
    var bar=mk('div',{className:'pk-battle-bar pk-battle-'+side},container);
    var avWrap=mk('div',{className:'pk-avatar-wrap'},bar);
    renderAvatar(avWrap,profile.avatar,side);
    renderStatusBadge(avWrap,status);
    var info=mk('div',{className:'pk-battle-info'},bar);
    mk('div',{className:'pk-battle-name'},info).textContent=profile.name;
    mk('div',{className:'pk-battle-score'},info).textContent=score+' 分';
  }

  // state: { oppProfile, playerProfile, oppScore, playerScore, total, completed, oppStatus, playerStatus }
  function renderBattleZone(container,state){
    var zone=mk('div',{className:'pk-battle-zone'},container);
    renderOneBar(zone,'opp',state.oppProfile,state.oppScore,state.oppStatus||'idle');
    var divider=mk('div',{className:'pk-vs-divider'},zone);
    mk('span',{className:'pk-vs-text'},divider).textContent='VS';
    if(state.total){
      renderProgressDots(divider,state.total,state.completed||0);
    }
    renderOneBar(zone,'player',state.playerProfile,state.playerScore,state.playerStatus||'idle');
    return zone;
  }

  function renderProgressDots(container,total,completed){
    var row=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress-dots'},container);
    for(var i=0;i<total;i++){
      mk('div',{className:'pk-dot'+(i<completed?' pk-dot-filled':'')},row);
    }
    return row;
  }

  // ---------- 模式选择 ----------
  function renderModeSelect(){
    var pop=openPop();
    var title=mk('div',{className:'pk-title'},pop);
    title.textContent='🎮 AI 对战';
    var sub=mk('div',{className:'pk-sub'},pop);
    sub.textContent='选一个项目，和当前聊天的角色 PK：每题限时作答，答得越快正确奖励分越高；当场出结果，最后比总分定胜负。';

    var modes=[
      {id:'spelling', icon:'📝', name:'单词拼写大赛', desc:'看中文提示，拼出对应英文单词'},
      {id:'trivia', icon:'🧠', name:'百科知识比拼', desc:'四选一，考验知识面广度'},
      {id:'draw', icon:'🎨', name:'你画我猜', desc:'一人一轮：你画对方猜，对方画你猜（可选轮数）'},
    ];
    modes.forEach(function(m){
      var card=mk('div',{className:'pk-mode-card'},pop);
      var ic=mk('div',{className:'pk-mode-ic'},card); ic.textContent=m.icon;
      var info=mk('div',{},card);
      var nm=mk('div',{className:'pk-mode-name'},info); nm.textContent=m.name;
      var ds=mk('div',{className:'pk-mode-desc'},info); ds.textContent=m.desc;
      card.addEventListener('click',function(){
        if(m.id==='draw'){ renderDrawSetup(); } else { startMode(m.id); }
      });
    });

    var cancel=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-ghost'},pop);
    cancel.textContent='关闭';
    cancel.addEventListener('click',closePop);
  }

  function renderLoading(msg){
    var pop=openPop(true);
    var box=mk('div',{className:'pk-loading'},pop);
    mk('div',{className:'pk-spin'},box);
    var t=mk('div',{},box); t.textContent=msg;
  }

  async function startMode(modeId){
    var mySession=sessionId;
    renderLoading('准备对战中…');
    var oppProfile=await getOpponentProfile();
    var playerProfile=await getPlayerProfile();
    if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;
    if(modeId==='spelling') await runSpellingRound(oppProfile,playerProfile);
    else if(modeId==='trivia') await runTriviaRound(oppProfile,playerProfile);
    // 注意：'draw' 模式必须先经过 renderDrawSetup() 选轮数，不通过这里直接启动。
  }

  // ================= 单词拼写大赛 =================
  async function generateSpellingItems(){
    var prompt='请生成5个难度适中的英语单词拼写题，适合中文母语学习者练习。'+
      '严格只输出JSON数组，不要输出任何解释、代码块标记或多余文字。'+
      '每项格式：{"hint":"中文释义或简短例句提示","answer":"对应的英文单词，全部小写字母"}。'+
      '单词长度4到10个字母，避免过于生僻的词汇。';
    var data=await genJSON(prompt);
    return (data||[]).filter(function(it){ return it && it.hint && it.answer; }).slice(0,5);
  }

  async function getOpponentSpellingAnswerOne(item,opp){
    var prompt=opponentIntro(opp)+'参加一场英语拼写比赛。请根据下面这条中文释义，写出你认为对应的英文单词。\n'+
      item.hint+'\n\n严格只输出JSON，不要输出任何解释或代码块标记，格式：{"answer":"你猜的单词"}。'+
      '哪怕不确定也要给出一个最接近的猜测，不要留空。';
    var t0=Date.now();
    try{
      var data=await genJSON(prompt);
      return { answer:(data && data.answer) ? String(data.answer) : '', elapsedMs:Date.now()-t0 };
    }catch(e){ return { answer:'', elapsedMs:Date.now()-t0 }; }
  }

  async function runSpellingRound(oppProfile,playerProfile){
    renderLoading('AI 正在出拼写题…');
    var items;
    try{ items=await generateSpellingItems(); }
    catch(e){ console.error('[PK-拼写]',e); toast('❌ 出题失败，请重试'); renderModeSelect(); return; }
    if(!items.length){ toast('❌ 出题失败，请重试'); renderModeSelect(); return; }

    var state={
      mode:'spelling', items:items, idx:0,
      oppProfile:oppProfile, playerProfile:playerProfile,
      oppScore:0, playerScore:0, total:items.length, completed:0,
      oppStatus:'idle', playerStatus:'idle', rows:[],
    };
    renderSpellingAnswering(state);
  }

  function renderSpellingAnswering(state){
    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);

    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='📝 单词拼写 · 第 '+(state.idx+1)+' / '+state.items.length+' 题';

    var qbox=mk('div',{className:'pk-q-box'},pop);
    mk('div',{className:'pk-q-text'},qbox).textContent=state.items[state.idx].hint;
    var input=mk('input',{className:'pk-input',type:'text',placeholder:'输入你猜的英文单词…',autocomplete:'off'},qbox);

    var submitted=false;
    function doSubmit(){
      if(submitted) return;
      submitted=true;
      stopActiveTimer();
      var elapsed=timerCtrl.elapsed();
      var val=input.value.trim();
      revealSpellingResult(state,val,elapsed);
    }
    var timerCtrl=startCountdown(pop,TIME_LIMIT_MS,doSubmit);

    var submitBtn=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-main'},pop);
    submitBtn.textContent='提交本题';
    submitBtn.addEventListener('click',doSubmit);
  }

  async function revealSpellingResult(state,playerAnswer,playerElapsedMs){
    var mySession=sessionId;
    state.playerStatus='idle';
    state.oppStatus='thinking';
    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);
    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='📝 单词拼写 · 第 '+(state.idx+1)+' / '+state.items.length+' 题';
    var qbox=mk('div',{className:'pk-q-box'},pop);
    mk('div',{className:'pk-q-text'},qbox).textContent=state.items[state.idx].hint;
    mk('input',{className:'pk-input',type:'text',value:playerAnswer,disabled:true},qbox);
    var waiting=mk('div',{className:'pk-hint'},pop);
    waiting.textContent=state.oppProfile.name+' 正在思考…';

    var item=state.items[state.idx];
    var oppResult=await getOpponentSpellingAnswerOne(item,state.oppProfile);
    if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;

    var truth=item.answer.trim().toLowerCase();
    var pOk=playerAnswer.trim().toLowerCase()===truth;
    var oOk=oppResult.answer.trim().toLowerCase()===truth;
    var pBonus=pOk?speedBonusFromElapsed(playerElapsedMs):0;
    var oBonus=oOk?speedBonusFromElapsed(oppResult.elapsedMs):0;
    var pGain=pOk?POINTS_PER_HIT+pBonus:0;
    var oGain=oOk?POINTS_PER_HIT+oBonus:0;

    state.playerScore+=pGain;
    state.oppScore+=oGain;
    state.completed=state.idx+1;
    state.playerStatus=pOk?'correct':'wrong';
    state.oppStatus=oOk?'correct':'wrong';
    state.rows.push({
      question:item.hint,truth:item.answer,
      playerAnswer:playerAnswer,playerOk:pOk,playerGain:pGain,playerBonus:pBonus,
      oppAnswer:oppResult.answer,oppOk:oOk,oppGain:oGain,oppBonus:oBonus,
    });

    renderSpellingRevealed(state);
  }

  function renderSpellingRevealed(state){
    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);
    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='📝 单词拼写 · 第 '+(state.idx+1)+' / '+state.items.length+' 题 · 结果';

    var row=state.rows[state.rows.length-1];
    var qbox=mk('div',{className:'pk-q-box'},pop);
    mk('div',{className:'pk-q-text'},qbox).textContent=row.question;
    var l1=mk('div',{className:'pk-reveal-line'},qbox);
    l1.textContent='正确答案：'+row.truth;
    var l2=mk('div',{className:'pk-reveal-line'},qbox);
    var l2span=mk('span',{className:row.playerOk?'pk-reveal-ok':'pk-reveal-bad'},l2);
    l2span.textContent='你答：'+(row.playerAnswer||'（未作答）')+(row.playerOk?' ✓ +'+row.playerGain+(row.playerBonus?'（含手速+'+row.playerBonus+'）':'') :' ✗');
    var l3=mk('div',{className:'pk-reveal-line'},qbox);
    var l3span=mk('span',{className:row.oppOk?'pk-reveal-ok':'pk-reveal-bad'},l3);
    l3span.textContent=state.oppProfile.name+'答：'+(row.oppAnswer||'（未作答）')+(row.oppOk?' ✓ +'+row.oppGain+(row.oppBonus?'（含手速+'+row.oppBonus+'）':'') :' ✗');

    var nextBtn=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-main'},pop);
    var isLast=state.idx===state.items.length-1;
    nextBtn.textContent=isLast?'查看最终结果':'下一题';
    nextBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){
      if(isLast){
        renderFinalSummary('📝 单词拼写大赛',state);
      } else {
        state.idx++;
        state.oppStatus='idle'; state.playerStatus='idle';
        renderSpellingAnswering(state);
      }
    });
  }

  // ================= 百科知识比拼 =================
  async function generateTriviaItems(){
    var prompt='请生成5道有趣的百科知识选择题，涵盖科学、历史、地理、生活常识等不同领域，难度适中。'+
      '严格只输出JSON数组，不要输出任何解释、代码块标记或多余文字。'+
      '每项格式：{"question":"题干","options":["选项A文本","选项B文本","选项C文本","选项D文本"],"correctIndex":0}'+
      '（correctIndex是0到3之间的整数，表示options数组中正确答案的下标）。';
    var data=await genJSON(prompt);
    return (data||[]).filter(function(it){
      return it && it.question && Array.isArray(it.options) && it.options.length===4 && typeof it.correctIndex==='number';
    }).slice(0,5);
  }

  async function getOpponentTriviaAnswerOne(item,opp){
    var listText=item.question+'\n'+item.options.map(function(o,oi){ return '   '+String.fromCharCode(65+oi)+'. '+o; }).join('\n');
    var prompt=opponentIntro(opp)+'参加一场百科知识问答比赛。请对下面这道题选出你认为正确的选项。\n\n'+listText+
      '\n\n严格只输出JSON，不要输出任何解释或代码块标记，格式：{"choice":0}'+
      '（choice是0到3之间的整数，对应A到D）。哪怕不确定也要选一个。';
    var t0=Date.now();
    try{
      var data=await genJSON(prompt);
      return { choice:(data && typeof data.choice==='number') ? data.choice : -1, elapsedMs:Date.now()-t0 };
    }catch(e){ return { choice:-1, elapsedMs:Date.now()-t0 }; }
  }

  async function runTriviaRound(oppProfile,playerProfile){
    renderLoading('AI 正在出百科题…');
    var items;
    try{ items=await generateTriviaItems(); }
    catch(e){ console.error('[PK-百科]',e); toast('❌ 出题失败，请重试'); renderModeSelect(); return; }
    if(!items.length){ toast('❌ 出题失败，请重试'); renderModeSelect(); return; }

    var state={
      mode:'trivia', items:items, idx:0,
      oppProfile:oppProfile, playerProfile:playerProfile,
      oppScore:0, playerScore:0, total:items.length, completed:0,
      oppStatus:'idle', playerStatus:'idle', rows:[],
    };
    renderTriviaAnswering(state);
  }

  function renderTriviaAnswering(state){
    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);

    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='🧠 百科知识 · 第 '+(state.idx+1)+' / '+state.items.length+' 题';

    var item=state.items[state.idx];
    var qbox=mk('div',{className:'pk-q-box'},pop);
    mk('div',{className:'pk-q-text'},qbox).textContent=item.question;

    var selected={val:-1};
    var optionEls=[];
    item.options.forEach(function(optText,oi){
      var opt=mk('div',{className:'pk-option'},qbox);
      opt.textContent=String.fromCharCode(65+oi)+'. '+optText;
      opt.addEventListener('click',function(){
        selected.val=oi;
        optionEls.forEach(function(el){ el.classList.remove('selected'); });
        opt.classList.add('selected');
      });
      optionEls.push(opt);
    });

    var submitted=false;
    function doSubmit(){
      if(submitted) return;
      if(selected.val===-1 && timerCtrl.elapsed()<TIME_LIMIT_MS){ toast('请先选一个选项'); return; }
      submitted=true;
      stopActiveTimer();
      var elapsed=timerCtrl.elapsed();
      revealTriviaResult(state,selected.val,elapsed);
    }
    var timerCtrl=startCountdown(pop,TIME_LIMIT_MS,doSubmit);

    var submitBtn=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-main'},pop);
    submitBtn.textContent='提交本题';
    submitBtn.addEventListener('click',doSubmit);
  }

  async function revealTriviaResult(state,playerChoice,playerElapsedMs){
    var mySession=sessionId;
    state.oppStatus='thinking';
    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);
    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='🧠 百科知识 · 第 '+(state.idx+1)+' / '+state.items.length+' 题';
    var item=state.items[state.idx];
    var qbox=mk('div',{className:'pk-q-box'},pop);
    mk('div',{className:'pk-q-text'},qbox).textContent=item.question;
    item.options.forEach(function(optText,oi){
      var opt=mk('div',{className:'pk-option pk-opt-disabled'},qbox);
      opt.textContent=String.fromCharCode(65+oi)+'. '+optText;
      if(oi===playerChoice) opt.classList.add('selected');
    });
    var waiting=mk('div',{className:'pk-hint'},pop);
    waiting.textContent=state.oppProfile.name+' 正在思考…';

    var oppResult=await getOpponentTriviaAnswerOne(item,state.oppProfile);
    if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;

    var pOk=playerChoice===item.correctIndex;
    var oOk=oppResult.choice===item.correctIndex;
    var pBonus=pOk?speedBonusFromElapsed(playerElapsedMs):0;
    var oBonus=oOk?speedBonusFromElapsed(oppResult.elapsedMs):0;
    var pGain=pOk?POINTS_PER_HIT+pBonus:0;
    var oGain=oOk?POINTS_PER_HIT+oBonus:0;

    state.playerScore+=pGain;
    state.oppScore+=oGain;
    state.completed=state.idx+1;
    state.playerStatus=pOk?'correct':'wrong';
    state.oppStatus=oOk?'correct':'wrong';

    var letters='ABCD';
    state.rows.push({
      question:item.question,
      truth:letters[item.correctIndex]+'. '+item.options[item.correctIndex],
      playerAnswer:playerChoice>=0?(letters[playerChoice]+'. '+item.options[playerChoice]):'（未作答）',
      playerOk:pOk,playerGain:pGain,playerBonus:pBonus,
      oppAnswer:(oppResult.choice>=0&&oppResult.choice<=3)?(letters[oppResult.choice]+'. '+item.options[oppResult.choice]):'（未作答）',
      oppOk:oOk,oppGain:oGain,oppBonus:oBonus,
    });

    renderTriviaRevealed(state,item,playerChoice,oppResult.choice);
  }

  function renderTriviaRevealed(state,item,playerChoice,oppChoice){
    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);
    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='🧠 百科知识 · 第 '+(state.idx+1)+' / '+state.items.length+' 题 · 结果';

    var qbox=mk('div',{className:'pk-q-box'},pop);
    mk('div',{className:'pk-q-text'},qbox).textContent=item.question;
    item.options.forEach(function(optText,oi){
      var opt=mk('div',{className:'pk-option pk-opt-disabled'},qbox);
      opt.textContent=String.fromCharCode(65+oi)+'. '+optText;
      if(oi===item.correctIndex) opt.classList.add('pk-opt-correct');
      else if(oi===playerChoice) opt.classList.add('pk-opt-wrong');
    });
    var row=state.rows[state.rows.length-1];
    var l2=mk('div',{className:'pk-reveal-line'},qbox);
    var l2span=mk('span',{className:row.playerOk?'pk-reveal-ok':'pk-reveal-bad'},l2);
    l2span.textContent='你选：'+row.playerAnswer+(row.playerOk?' ✓ +'+row.playerGain+(row.playerBonus?'（含手速+'+row.playerBonus+'）':''):' ✗');
    var l3=mk('div',{className:'pk-reveal-line'},qbox);
    var l3span=mk('span',{className:row.oppOk?'pk-reveal-ok':'pk-reveal-bad'},l3);
    l3span.textContent=state.oppProfile.name+'选：'+row.oppAnswer+(row.oppOk?' ✓ +'+row.oppGain+(row.oppBonus?'（含手速+'+row.oppBonus+'）':''):' ✗');

    var nextBtn=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-main'},pop);
    var isLast=state.idx===state.items.length-1;
    nextBtn.textContent=isLast?'查看最终结果':'下一题';
    nextBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){
      if(isLast){
        renderFinalSummary('🧠 百科知识比拼',state);
      } else {
        state.idx++;
        state.oppStatus='idle'; state.playerStatus='idle';
        renderTriviaAnswering(state);
      }
    });
  }

  // ---------- 拼写/百科 通用最终结果页 ----------
  function renderFinalSummary(title,state){
    var pop=openPop(true);
    var t=mk('div',{className:'pk-title'},pop);
    t.textContent=title+' · 最终结果';

    var banner=mk('div',{className:'pk-banner'},pop);
    if(state.playerScore>state.oppScore){ banner.classList.add('pk-banner-win'); banner.textContent='🏆 你赢了！'; }
    else if(state.playerScore<state.oppScore){ banner.classList.add('pk-banner-lose'); banner.textContent='😅 '+state.oppProfile.name+' 赢了'; }
    else { banner.classList.add('pk-banner-draw'); banner.textContent='🤝 平局！'; }

    renderBattleZone(pop,state);

    state.rows.forEach(function(r,i){
      var row=mk('div',{className:'pk-result-row'},pop);
      var qline=mk('div',{className:'pk-result-q'},row);
      qline.textContent=(i+1)+'. '+r.question+'（正确答案：'+r.truth+'）';
      var l1=mk('div',{className:'pk-result-line'},row);
      var l1a=mk('span',{},l1); l1a.textContent='你：'+r.playerAnswer;
      if(r.playerOk===null){
        var pspan=mk('span',{},l1); pspan.style.color='#94a3b8'; pspan.textContent='（不计分）';
      } else {
        mk('span',{className:r.playerOk?'pk-tag-ok':'pk-tag-bad'},l1).textContent=r.playerOk?'✓ 正确':'✗ 错误';
      }
      var l2=mk('div',{className:'pk-result-line'},row);
      var l2a=mk('span',{},l2); l2a.textContent=state.oppProfile.name+'：'+r.oppAnswer;
      if(r.oppOk===null){
        var ospan=mk('span',{},l2); ospan.style.color='#94a3b8'; ospan.textContent='（不计分）';
      } else {
        mk('span',{className:r.oppOk?'pk-tag-ok':'pk-tag-bad'},l2).textContent=r.oppOk?'✓ 正确':'✗ 错误';
      }
    });

    var replay=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-main'},pop);
    replay.textContent='再来一局';
    replay.addEventListener('click',function(){
      if(state.mode==='draw'){ renderDrawSetup(); } else { startMode(state.mode); }
    });

    var back=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-ghost'},pop);
    back.textContent='返回菜单';
    back.addEventListener('click',renderModeSelect);
  }

  // 按类别预设的简笔画描线模板（画布坐标系 300x300）。
  // 生图失败时会照着这份模板描一遍，而不是画纯随机的乱线，

  function pickRandom(arr,usedWords){
    var pool=arr.filter(function(it){ return !usedWords || usedWords.indexOf(it.word)===-1; });
    if(pool.length===0) pool=arr; // 词库耗尽时兜底允许重复
    return pool[Math.floor(Math.random()*pool.length)];
  }

  function buildCanvasTool(container){
    var canvas=mk('canvas',{className:'pk-canvas',width:300,height:300},container);
    var ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
    function fillBg(){ ctx.fillStyle='#1a1a2e'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height); }
    fillBg();
    ctx.strokeStyle='#fdba74'; ctx.lineWidth=5; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.lineJoin='round';
    var drawing=false;
    function getPos(e){
      var rect=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
      var cx=(e.touches&&e.touches[0])?e.touches[0].clientX:e.clientX;
      var cy=(e.touches&&e.touches[0])?e.touches[0].clientY:e.clientY;
      return { x:(cx-rect.left)*(canvas.width/rect.width), y:(cy-rect.top)*(canvas.height/rect.height) };
    }
    function start(e){ e.preventDefault(); drawing=true; var p=getPos(e); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(p.x,p.y); }
    function move(e){ if(!drawing) return; e.preventDefault(); var p=getPos(e); ctx.lineTo(p.x,p.y); ctx.stroke(); }
    function end(){ drawing=false; }
    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown',start);
    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove',move);
    canvas.addEventListener('mouseup',end);
    canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave',end);
    canvas.addEventListener('touchstart',start,{passive:false});
    canvas.addEventListener('touchmove',move,{passive:false});
    canvas.addEventListener('touchend',end);
    return {
      canvas:canvas,
      clear:fillBg,
      toDataURL:function(){ try{ return canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); }catch(e){ return null; } },
    };
  }

  // 对方"猜你画的"：看不到画，只能靠完整线索一次性猜（用真实生成耗时算手速分）
  async function getOpponentGuessFromClues(target,opp){
    var hints='类别：'+target.category+'；字数：'+target.word.length+'个字；首字：'+target.word[0];
    var prompt=opponentIntro(opp)+'你看不到对方画的内容，只能根据下面这些线索来猜这个词是什么：'+hints+
      '。严格只输出JSON，不要输出任何解释或代码块标记，格式：{"answer":"你猜的词"}。哪怕不确定也要给出一个最接近的猜测。';
    var t0=Date.now();
    try{
      var data=await genJSON(prompt);
      return { answer:(data&&data.answer)?String(data.answer):'', elapsedMs:Date.now()-t0 };
    }catch(e){ return { answer:'', elapsedMs:Date.now()-t0 }; }
  }

  // 对方"画给你猜"：调用真实生图
  var IMAGE_GEN_TIMEOUT_MS=15000;

  // 给一个 Promise 包一层等待上限：超时就当作失败处理（resolve null），
  // 不会让涂鸦动画因为生图请求迟迟不返回/不报错而无限期空转下去。
  function withTimeout(promise,ms){
    return new Promise(function(resolve){
      var settled=false;
      var timer=setTimeout(function(){
        if(!settled){ settled=true; resolve(null); }
      },ms);
      promise.then(function(v){
        if(!settled){ settled=true; clearTimeout(timer); resolve(v); }
      }).catch(function(){
        if(!settled){ settled=true; clearTimeout(timer); resolve(null); }
      });
    });
  }

  async function generateOpponentSketch(target){
    var prompt='一张简笔画风格的插画，纯白背景，画面主体是'+target.word+
      '，线条简洁清晰，适合看图猜物的小游戏，不要出现任何文字或数字。';
    try{
      var dataUrl=await withTimeout(tavo.image.generate(prompt,{aspectRatio:'1:1'}),IMAGE_GEN_TIMEOUT_MS);
      return dataUrl;
    }catch(e){
      console.warn('[PK-你画我猜] 生图失败，回退为文字线索',e);
      return null;
    }
  }

  // 仿手绘涂鸦动画：先用和玩家画布同色同粗细的随机曲线模拟"正在画"的笔触，
  // 涂鸦画完后淡入真实生成的图片。涂鸦本身是随机生成的装饰效果，不是真实笔画。
  // 仿手绘涂鸦动画：从头到尾画一遍就停下（不再无限循环擦了画/画了擦）。
  // 和生图请求并行执行；生图成功就淡入真实图片；生图失败/超时，
  // 就直接把画完的这份涂鸦本身当成"对方的作品"交给玩家看+配合线索猜，
  // 不会再显示"生图失败"这种破坏体验的提示——涂鸦本身也是真实画出来的笔触，
  // 只是不对应实际语义内容，所以那种情况下会额外展示线索兜底猜测的公平性。
  function startSketchLoop(container,category){
    var canvas=mk('canvas',{className:'pk-reveal-canvas',width:300,height:300},container);
    var ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
    function clearBg(){ ctx.fillStyle='#1a1a2e'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height); }
    clearBg();
    ctx.strokeStyle='#fdba74'; ctx.lineWidth=5; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.lineJoin='round';

    var template=CATEGORY_SKETCHES[category];
    var strokes;
    if(template && template.length){
      strokes=template;
    } else {
      // 没有对应类别模板时的兜底：退回随机线条
      var strokeCount=8+Math.floor(Math.random()*4);
      strokes=[];
      for(var i=0;i<strokeCount;i++){
        strokes.push({
          type:'curve',
          x0:20+Math.random()*(canvas.width-40), y0:20+Math.random()*(canvas.height-40),
          x1:20+Math.random()*(canvas.width-40), y1:20+Math.random()*(canvas.height-40),
          cx:20+Math.random()*(canvas.width-40), cy:20+Math.random()*(canvas.height-40),
        });
      }
    }
    var totalDuration=3600;
    var perStroke=totalDuration/strokes.length;
    var start=Date.now();
    var stopped=false;
    var finishedSketch=false;

    function drawStrokeFrac(s,frac){
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(s.x0,s.y0);
      if(s.type==='line'){
        var xl=s.x0+(s.x1-s.x0)*frac;
        var yl=s.y0+(s.y1-s.y0)*frac;
        ctx.lineTo(xl,yl);
      } else {
        var steps=24;
        for(var t=1;t<=steps;t++){
          var tt=(t/steps);
          if(tt>frac) break;
          var xt=(1-tt)*(1-tt)*s.x0 + 2*(1-tt)*tt*s.cx + tt*tt*s.x1;
          var yt=(1-tt)*(1-tt)*s.y0 + 2*(1-tt)*tt*s.cy + tt*tt*s.y1;
          ctx.lineTo(xt,yt);
        }
      }
      ctx.stroke();
    }

    function drawFullSketch(){
      clearBg();
      strokes.forEach(function(s){ drawStrokeFrac(s,1); });
    }

    function step(){
      if(stopped) return;
      var elapsed=Date.now()-start;
      clearBg();
      var doneCount=Math.floor(elapsed/perStroke);
      for(var i=0;i<Math.min(doneCount,strokes.length);i++){ drawStrokeFrac(strokes[i],1); }
      if(doneCount<strokes.length){
        var curFrac=(elapsed-doneCount*perStroke)/perStroke;
        drawStrokeFrac(strokes[doneCount],Math.min(1,curFrac));
        T.requestAnimationFrame(step);
      } else {
        finishedSketch=true; // 画完一遍，停在这一帧，不再重画、不擦除
      }
    }
    T.requestAnimationFrame(step);

    return {
      // dataUrl 有值：淡入真实生成的图片。
      // dataUrl 为空（生图失败/超时）：把已经画完的涂鸦本身导出成图，交给猜词环节继续用。
      // onDone(isReal, finalImageUrl) —— isReal 用来决定猜词页要不要额外展示线索兜底。
      stopAndReveal:function(dataUrl,onDone){
        stopped=true;
        if(dataUrl){
          var img=new T.Image();
          img.onload=function(){
            var fadeStart=Date.now();
            var fadeDuration=500;
            function fadeStep(){
              var fe=Date.now()-fadeStart;
              var alpha=Math.min(1,fe/fadeDuration);
              clearBg();
              ctx.globalAlpha=alpha;
              ctx.drawImage(img,0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
              ctx.globalAlpha=1;
              if(alpha<1){ T.requestAnimationFrame(fadeStep); }
              else if(onDone){ onDone(true,dataUrl); }
            }
            T.requestAnimationFrame(fadeStep);
          };
          img.onerror=function(){ finalizeWithSketch(); };
          img.src=dataUrl;
        } else {
          finalizeWithSketch();
        }

        function finalizeWithSketch(){
          if(!finishedSketch){ drawFullSketch(); }
          var sketchDataUrl=null;
          try{ sketchDataUrl=canvas.toDataURL('image/png'); }catch(e){}
          if(onDone) onDone(false,sketchDataUrl);
        }
      }
    };
  }

  async function startDrawGuessWithRounds(numRounds){
    var mySession=sessionId;
    renderLoading('准备对战中…');
    var oppProfile=await getOpponentProfile();
    var playerProfile=await getPlayerProfile();
    if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;
    await runDrawGuessRound(oppProfile,playerProfile,numRounds);
  }

  async function runDrawGuessRound(oppProfile,playerProfile,numRounds){
    var state={
      mode:'draw', pairIndex:0, numRounds:numRounds,
      oppProfile:oppProfile, playerProfile:playerProfile,
      oppScore:0, playerScore:0, total:numRounds*2, completed:0,
      oppStatus:'idle', playerStatus:'idle', rows:[], sketches:[], usedWords:[],
    };
    renderYourDrawPhase(state);
  }

  // ---- 你画，对方猜 ----
  function renderYourDrawPhase(state){
    var target=pickRandom(WORD_POOL,state.usedWords);
    state.usedWords.push(target.word);

    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);
    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='🎨 你画我猜 · 第 '+(state.pairIndex+1)+' / '+state.numRounds+' 轮 · 你画，对方猜';
    mk('div',{className:'pk-draw-word'},pop).textContent='请画：'+target.word;
    var hint=mk('div',{className:'pk-hint'},pop);
    hint.textContent='对方看不到这幅画，只能靠线索来猜。画完点下面的按钮，或者时间到自动进入对方猜词环节。（按钮放在画布上方，不用滑过画布也能点到）';

    var advanced=false;
    function advance(){
      if(advanced) return;
      advanced=true;
      stopActiveTimer();
      var dataUrl=tool.toDataURL();
      state.sketches.push({word:target.word,dataUrl:dataUrl,by:'player'});
      renderOpponentGuessing(state,target);
    }
    startCountdown(pop,TURN_DRAW_TIME_MS,advance);

    var tools=mk('div',{className:'pk-canvas-tools'},pop);
    var clearBtn=mk('button',{},tools); clearBtn.textContent='清空画布';
    clearBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){ tool.clear(); });

    var doneBtn=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-main'},pop);
    doneBtn.textContent='完成绘画，让对方猜';
    doneBtn.addEventListener('click',advance);

    var canvasWrap=mk('div',{},pop);
    var tool=buildCanvasTool(canvasWrap);
  }

  async function renderOpponentGuessing(state,target){
    var mySession=sessionId;
    state.oppStatus='thinking';
    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);
    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='🎨 你画我猜 · 第 '+(state.pairIndex+1)+' / '+state.numRounds+' 轮 · 对方猜词中';

    var sketch=state.sketches[state.sketches.length-1];
    if(sketch && sketch.dataUrl){
      var srow=mk('div',{className:'pk-sketch-row pk-q-box'},pop);
      mk('img',{className:'pk-sketch-thumb',src:sketch.dataUrl},srow);
      mk('div',{},srow).textContent='你画的是：'+sketch.word;
    }
    var waiting=mk('div',{className:'pk-hint'},pop);
    waiting.textContent=state.oppProfile.name+' 正在根据线索仔细思考…';

    var oppResult=await getOpponentGuessFromClues(target,state.oppProfile);
    if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;
    var oOk=oppResult.answer.trim()===target.word;
    var oBonus=oOk?speedBonusFromElapsed(oppResult.elapsedMs):0;
    var oGain=oOk?POINTS_PER_HIT+oBonus:0;

    state.oppScore+=oGain;
    state.completed+=1;
    state.oppStatus=oOk?'correct':'wrong';
    state.playerStatus='idle';
    state.rows.push({
      question:'你画的：'+target.word,truth:target.word,
      playerAnswer:'（负责绘画，本回合不计分）',playerOk:null,playerGain:0,playerBonus:0,
      oppAnswer:oppResult.answer,oppOk:oOk,oppGain:oGain,oppBonus:oBonus,
    });

    renderYourDrawTurnRevealed(state,target,oppResult.answer);
  }

  function renderYourDrawTurnRevealed(state,target,oppAnswer){
    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);
    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='🎨 你画我猜 · 第 '+(state.pairIndex+1)+' / '+state.numRounds+' 轮 · 结果';

    var sketch=state.sketches[state.sketches.length-1];
    if(sketch && sketch.dataUrl){
      var srow=mk('div',{className:'pk-sketch-row pk-q-box'},pop);
      mk('img',{className:'pk-sketch-thumb',src:sketch.dataUrl},srow);
      mk('div',{},srow).textContent='你画的是：'+sketch.word;
    }

    var row=state.rows[state.rows.length-1];
    var qbox=mk('div',{className:'pk-q-box'},pop);
    var l3=mk('div',{className:'pk-reveal-line'},qbox);
    var l3span=mk('span',{className:row.oppOk?'pk-reveal-ok':'pk-reveal-bad'},l3);
    l3span.textContent=state.oppProfile.name+'猜：'+(row.oppAnswer||'（未作答）')+(row.oppOk?' ✓ +'+row.oppGain+(row.oppBonus?'（含手速+'+row.oppBonus+'）':''):' ✗');

    var nextBtn=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-main'},pop);
    nextBtn.textContent='下一步：对方画，你猜';
    nextBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){
      state.oppStatus='idle'; state.playerStatus='idle';
      renderOpponentDrawPhase(state);
    });
  }

  // ---- 对方画（真实生图+仿手绘动画），你猜 ----
  async function renderOpponentDrawPhase(state){
    var mySession=sessionId;
    var target=pickRandom(WORD_POOL,state.usedWords);
    state.usedWords.push(target.word);

    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);
    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='🎨 你画我猜 · 第 '+(state.pairIndex+1)+' / '+state.numRounds+' 轮 · 对方作画中';
    var hint=mk('div',{className:'pk-hint'},pop);
    hint.textContent=state.oppProfile.name+' 正在画…';
    var canvasHolder=mk('div',{},pop);

    // 涂鸦动画立刻开始播放（画一遍就停），不等生图接口返回——
    // 这样不管生图要多久，画面上始终有"正在画"的动态，不会出现只有文字的空白等待期。
    var loopCtrl=startSketchLoop(canvasHolder,target.category);

    var dataUrl=await generateOpponentSketch(target);
    if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;

    loopCtrl.stopAndReveal(dataUrl,function(isReal,finalImageUrl){
      if(isStaleSession(mySession)) return;
      state.sketches.push({word:target.word,dataUrl:finalImageUrl,by:'opp',isReal:isReal});
      renderYourGuessPhase(state,target,finalImageUrl,isReal);
    });
  }

  function renderYourGuessPhase(state,target,dataUrl,isReal){
    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);
    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='🎨 你画我猜 · 第 '+(state.pairIndex+1)+' / '+state.numRounds+' 轮 · 你来猜';

    if(dataUrl){
      var imgWrap=mk('div',{className:'pk-q-box'},pop);
      mk('img',{style:'width:100%;border-radius:10px;display:block;',src:dataUrl},imgWrap);
    }
    if(!isReal){
      var abstractNote=mk('div',{className:'pk-hint'},pop);
      abstractNote.textContent=dataUrl
        ? (state.oppProfile.name+' 画的是这一类东西的简笔画（不一定精确对应这个词），看不准的话可以结合下面的线索：')
        : '线索：';
      var hintList=mk('div',{className:'pk-hint-list'},pop);
      mk('div',{className:'pk-hint-item'},hintList).textContent='类别：'+target.category;
      mk('div',{className:'pk-hint-item'},hintList).textContent='字数：'+target.word.length+' 个字';
      mk('div',{className:'pk-hint-item'},hintList).textContent='首字：'+target.word[0];
    }

    var qbox=mk('div',{className:'pk-q-box'},pop);
    var input=mk('input',{className:'pk-input',type:'text',placeholder:'输入你猜的词…',autocomplete:'off'},qbox);

    var submitted=false;
    function doSubmit(){
      if(submitted) return;
      submitted=true;
      stopActiveTimer();
      var elapsed=timerCtrl.elapsed();
      var val=input.value.trim();
      revealYourGuessResult(state,target,val,elapsed);
    }
    var timerCtrl=startCountdown(pop,TIME_LIMIT_MS,doSubmit);

    var submitBtn=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-main'},pop);
    submitBtn.textContent='提交猜词';
    submitBtn.addEventListener('click',doSubmit);
  }

  function revealYourGuessResult(state,target,playerGuess,playerElapsedMs){
    var pOk=playerGuess.trim()===target.word;
    var pBonus=pOk?speedBonusFromElapsed(playerElapsedMs):0;
    var pGain=pOk?POINTS_PER_HIT+pBonus:0;

    state.playerScore+=pGain;
    state.completed+=1;
    state.playerStatus=pOk?'correct':'wrong';
    state.oppStatus='idle';
    state.rows.push({
      question:'对方画的（谜底）：'+target.word,truth:target.word,
      playerAnswer:playerGuess,playerOk:pOk,playerGain:pGain,playerBonus:pBonus,
      oppAnswer:'（负责作画，本回合不计分）',oppOk:null,oppGain:0,oppBonus:0,
    });

    renderYourGuessTurnRevealed(state,target,playerGuess);
  }

  function renderYourGuessTurnRevealed(state,target,playerGuess){
    var pop=openPop(true);
    renderBattleZone(pop,state);
    var prog=mk('div',{className:'pk-progress'},pop);
    prog.textContent='🎨 你画我猜 · 第 '+(state.pairIndex+1)+' / '+state.numRounds+' 轮 · 结果';

    var sketch=state.sketches[state.sketches.length-1];
    if(sketch && sketch.dataUrl){
      var srow=mk('div',{className:'pk-sketch-row pk-q-box'},pop);
      mk('img',{className:'pk-sketch-thumb',src:sketch.dataUrl},srow);
      mk('div',{},srow).textContent='谜底是：'+target.word;
    }

    var row=state.rows[state.rows.length-1];
    var qbox=mk('div',{className:'pk-q-box'},pop);
    var l2=mk('div',{className:'pk-reveal-line'},qbox);
    var l2span=mk('span',{className:row.playerOk?'pk-reveal-ok':'pk-reveal-bad'},l2);
    l2span.textContent='你猜：'+(row.playerAnswer||'（未作答）')+(row.playerOk?' ✓ +'+row.playerGain+(row.playerBonus?'（含手速+'+row.playerBonus+'）':''):' ✗');

    var nextBtn=mk('button',{className:'pk-btn-main'},pop);
    var isLast=state.pairIndex===state.numRounds-1;
    nextBtn.textContent=isLast?'查看最终结果':'下一轮';
    nextBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){
      if(isLast){
        renderFinalSummary('🎨 你画我猜',state);
      } else {
        state.pairIndex++;
        state.oppStatus='idle'; state.playerStatus='idle';
        renderYourDrawPhase(state);
      }
    });
  }

  buildBtn();
  console.log('[PK对战插件v13] 已加载');

}catch(e){console.error('[PK对战插件]',e);}
})();
</script>
